title: Madketplace
description: Buy everything in the game! This includes blocks, items, entities and dimensions!
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/89d2373ef989e4d1f3e60f85c57de81510a0e792.png)

Hi, there!

Do you feel life is too relaxed and easy?
Do you wish to cause yourself immense pain, suffering and frustration?

Me too! That's why I created MADKETPLACE, which locks EVERYTHING behind a paywall!

Want to craft a pickaxe? No problem! Just purchase OAK LOG, OAK PLANKS, CRAFTING TABLE, STICK, and WOODEN PICKAXE!


## HOW TO PLAY:
- You start off with dirt and grass block unlocked.
- You must sell it with the SELL GUI, which is brought up via keybind.
- After selling around 100, you can buy access to most blocks and items in the game (prices are liable to change in the future)
- Interacting with anything in any way will bring up the BUY GUI!

## FAQ:

**Does it work in multiplayer?**
Yes! Each player has their own currency and unlocks.

**Can I use commands to give myself minecoins and unlock stuff?**
Yep! '/madketplace' will give you all you need.

**How can I give other players my money?**
Use /pay <user> <amount>.

**After an update my world is (still) broken. How can I fix it?**
I normally try to automatically repair all broken worlds through updates, so if you have this issue, please report it and I'll fix it in the next update!

**Where can I complain?**
(https://discord.gg/Zrr4Nd96Rm)

**I lost my Trade Terminal. How can I get another?**
Either relog or press 'I'.

**How can I make my mod compatible?**
Details at (https://discord.gg/Zrr4Nd96Rm).

**How can I help choose item prices?**
At (https://discord.gg/Zrr4Nd96Rm).

**Will this come out for future game versions?**
Probably somepoint, but it isn't a priority. With the way MCreator works, I'll probably only update it if it is severely out of date. Furthermore, I have used some custom code in it, and I don't actually know java (I don't wanna learn a 3rd language) so I'd have to manually update that too, and I really don't want to do that unless I have to.

**Why isn't there a translation for <language>?**
I'm not bilingual, except a small bit of French. If you want to help translate, please contact me on discord through @mrbenjaroo.

## COMPLETE CREDITS:
- xsy0420 (Translations)
